models.title: Schluter Kerdi-Seal Mixing Valve Seal 4-1/2in.
source_fields:
Kerdi-Seal-MV is a prefabricated waterproofing seal with an over-molded rubber gasket, designed to protect moisture-sensitive backing panels at the mixing valve. This innovative product ensures your installation remains dry and secure, providing long-lasting protection and peace of mind.

  • Protects moisture-sensitive backing panels at the mixing valve
  • Diameter of opening 4-1/2 inches
  • Only 0.004 inches thick to limit build-up
  • 1 unit per package

Ensure your projects are completed with the highest level of precision and care by using Kerdi-Seal-MV.

models.title: Laticrete Hydro Ban 4 1/2 in. Mixing Valve Collar
source_fields:
The Laticrete Hydro Ban 4 1/2 in. Mixing Valve Collar is a specialized component engineered to ensure a watertight seal around shower mixing valves, safeguarding installations from water intrusion in wet environments. Designed for seamless integration with Hydro Ban systems, it delivers ease of installation and durable protection.

  • Designed to seal around shower mixing valves, providing a dependable waterproof barrier
  • Features a double O-ring design for enhanced sealing and secure fit
  • Made from flexible urethane rubber that conforms effectively to various substrates
  • Compatible with Hydro Ban waterproofing systems, maintaining waterproof integrity
  • Simple, one-piece installation—press into thin-set around the valve and tile directly over it
  • Suitable for interior residential and commercial shower applications , including steam showers and wet rooms

The Laticrete Hydro Ban 4 1/2 in. Mixing Valve Collar provides reliable, easy-to-install protection for critical transition points in showers, ensuring longevity and waterproof performance.

models.title: wedi Subliner Dry Mixing Valve Seal
source_fields:
The flexible membrane collar is designed for sealing around mixing valves in a wedi Fundo Shower Installation. Constructed from the high-quality wedi Subliner Dry waterproof membrane, this collar ensures a secure and watertight seal, providing peace of mind and durability for your shower system.

  • Crafted from premium wedi Subliner Dry waterproof membrane
  • Easily installed using wedi Joint Sealant or wedi S-DRY SEAL
  • Features an opening measuring 3 15/16 inches in diameter
  • Can be easily modified to fit specific needs
  • Compatible with both wedi Fundo Shower Installations and wedi Steam Shower Installations

Enhance the reliability and longevity of your shower installation with this expertly designed flexible membrane collar.

models.title: Rhiver Chrome Tub and Shower Combination
source_fields:
The Rhiver Chrome Tub and Shower Combination features a contemporary and sophisticated design with its sleek style and rounded curves. The Rhiver Collection meet WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance. The Versitech shower valve features superior pressure balance technology to prevent scalding, solid brass construction for maximum reliability, and optional back-to-back installation for flexibility. The Rhiver Tub & Shower faucet coordinates perfectly with the collections bathroom sink faucets to complete the look.

  • Contemporary design complements both sleek and modern bathrooms
  • The Versitech shower valve features superior pressure balance technology to prevent scalding, solid brass construction for maximum reliability, and optional back-to-back installation for flexibility.
  • Single function showerhead with powerful, consistent performance
  • WaterSense certified with 1.75 GPM flow rate that conserves water without sacrificing performance
  • Spout Type: Tub Spout; Spout Reach: 5.20

models.title: Schluter Kerdi-Drain PVC Flange Kit 2in. Drain Outlet
source_fields:
The Schluter Kerdi-Drain Flange PVC 2in. With Seals and Corners provides a reliable, watertight foundation for tiled shower installations. Designed to integrate seamlessly with Schluter shower trays and mortar bed systems, this durable PVC flange ensures long-lasting performance in both residential and commercial projects.

  • PVC flange with 2 in. outlet
  • Compatible with KERDI-DRAIN grates (sold separately)
  • Includes four inside corners, two outside corners, one 3/4 in. pipe seal, and one 4-1/2 in. mixing valve seal
  • Works with KERDI-SHOWER-T, -TS, and -TT shower trays or mortar bases
  • Suitable for residential and commercial use

Engineered for easy installation and superior waterproofing, this KERDI-DRAIN flange offers a dependable solution for creating fully sealed, professional-quality shower systems.

models.title: Schluter Kerdi-Drain Flange ABS 2in.
source_fields:
The Schluter Kerdi-Drain ABS 2in. Flange Kit provides a dependable waterproofing solution designed to integrate seamlessly with Schluter shower systems. Built for performance and durability, this kit is ideal for both residential and commercial tile installations.

  • ABS flange with 2 in. outlet
  • Compatible with KERDI-DRAIN grates (sold separately)
  • Includes four inside corners, two outside corners, one 3/4 in. pipe seal, and one 4-1/2 in. mixing valve seal
  • Designed for use with KERDI-SHOWER-T, -TS, and -TT shower trays or mortar bed installations
  • Suitable for residential and commercial applications

A reliable, easy-to-install drain flange system that helps create a watertight foundation for any tiled shower.

notes: Model intelligence is a compound workflow: category search, model extraction, spec-document capture, and model-page probing.
